title: C1 · Avancé
subtitle: Academic vocabulary, advanced verbs, professional language.
focus: 2000 C1 French lemmas across abstraction, academic reasoning, humanities, philosophy, rhetoric, ethics and advanced discourse. Translation, example and example_en are placeholders for now.

groups.title: Group 1 · Core vocabulary
groups.focus: 100 real French lemmas across noun / verb / adj / adv / phrase. Translation and example fields are placeholders.

groups.title: Group 2 · Concepts et abstraction
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for conceptual precision, abstraction, definition and theoretical framing.

groups.title: Group 3 · Argumentation critique
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for critique, rebuttal, concession, implication and high-level reasoning.

groups.title: Group 4 · Sciences humaines
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for social sciences, interpretation, identity, institutions and historical analysis.

groups.title: Group 5 · Philosophie et pensée
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for philosophical problems, epistemology, ontology, ethics and judgement.

groups.title: Group 6 · Littérature et esthétique
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for literary analysis, style, narrative, art, taste and reception.

groups.title: Group 7 · Recherche académique
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for methodology, evidence, modelling, publication, peer review and academic writing.

groups.title: Group 8 · Politique et idéologies
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for ideologies, legitimacy, power, public conflict and political thought.

groups.title: Group 9 · Droit et norme
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for norms, legal reasoning, obligations, interpretation and institutional legitimacy.

groups.title: Group 10 · Économie politique
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for political economy, finance, incentives, distribution and systemic change.

groups.title: Group 11 · Médias et discours
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for discourse analysis, framing, rhetoric, media systems and public language.

groups.title: Group 12 · Éthique et société
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for ethical judgement, responsibility, vulnerability, dignity and collective life.

groups.title: Group 13 · Technologie et subjectivité
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for technology, agency, automation, attention, mediation and subjectivity.

groups.title: Group 14 · Environnement complexe
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for ecological systems, limits, transitions, irreversibility and long-term risk.

groups.title: Group 15 · Histoire et mémoire
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for memory, archives, historical narration, rupture and continuity.

groups.title: Group 16 · Langage et sémiotique
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for language, signs, meaning, translation, ambiguity and interpretation.

groups.title: Group 17 · Psychologie et perception
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for perception, cognition, affect, bias, motivation and self-reflection.

groups.title: Group 18 · Organisations avancées
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for governance, coordination, institutional design and professional complexity.

groups.title: Group 19 · Nuance et registre
groups.focus: C1 vocabulary for register, style, hedging, contrast, precision and rhetorical stance.

groups.title: Group 20 · Expressions C1
groups.focus: C1 idiomatic and discourse expressions for refined argument, caution, synthesis and stance.
